Name: 5Cr15MoV Rosewood Utility Knife 150 mm LKWUK10001
Short description:
Key Features

\n
    \n
  • Utility knife makes up to where a regular chef knife fails to deliver. It has the similar capacity to cut everyday food like meat and vegetables, but performs better for food with smaller portions.
    • \n
  • 5Cr15MoV is a stainless steel with a little bit of carbon in it. Adding carbon to the steel makes it relatively hard, and has a decent ability to retain edge well. But the finest property of this steel is the ability to prevent the knife from rusting.
    • \n
  • The blade was extended to the back of the handle, and that’s called the full tang structure. Full tang knives are generally heavier and much sturdier.
    • \n
\n

Good for

\nMeat, Fish, Vegetables, Fruit, Herbs

Name: 8Cr13MoV Rosewood Utility Knife 155 mm LKWUK10002
Short description:
Key Features

\n
    \n
  • Don’t get tricked by the size of the knife. It is a fully fledged all-purpose knife just like a lengthier chef knife or a Gyuto. You can use it as an alternative to cut daily ingredients from meat to vegetables.
    • \n
  • Forged and heat treated from 8Cr13MoV steel, the knife is dangerously sharp with a 57 HRC. Using it to cut thin slices of food will be a pleasure.
    • \n
  • A specially designed rosewood handle. The top of the handle was slightly pushed inward to offer a better gripping experience and control.
    • \n
\n

Good for

\nMeat, Fish, Vegetables, Fruit, Herbs
